about.title: From a Small Workshop to a Recognized Brand
about.story: Picasso Masr is not just a business — it's a dream that started in a small Cairo workshop. We began with one printer and one big dream: that anyone who wants to live their favourite character can find something to make that happen.
about.value1_desc: We never stop at good enough — every piece is reviewed multiple times
about.value2_desc: Every small detail matters — from shape to color to measurement
about.value3_desc: What we say we do — no empty promises
about.value4_desc: Every piece carries the soul of real Egyptian artists
